summary: Iteration 19: Verified ePaper summary expansion fix - ALL articles now have 400+ character summaries. Telugu ePaper shows ONLY Telugu titles/content. English ePaper shows ONLY English content. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - dense newspaper layout with no blank columns.

summary_expansion_fix.issue_fixed: Blank spaces in Telugu ePaper layout due to short summaries
fix_applied: Character limits increased 3x (hero: 800-1400, mid: 550-900, bottom: 450-750, tail: 350-600)
AI expansion prompt upgraded from 200-300 words to 400-500 words

critical_code_review_comments: SUMMARY_REQS dict in epaper.py correctly defines position-based character limits (lines 203-208)
expand_summary_for_epaper in helpers.py uses 400-500 words prompt (lines 299-327)
trim_to_complete_sentences ensures summaries end with complete sentences (lines 254-296)
Language-specific cache keys prevent cross-language contamination
minHeight: 1500px removed from NewspaperPage.jsx - content now fills naturally

test_credentials.guest: No login required - navigate directly to /epaper

seed_data_creation: Used existing data - 2026-03-08 morning/evening editions with pre-expanded summaries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Summary expansion fix VERIFIED. All articles in both Telugu and English ePaper editions now have 400+ character summaries. The preexpand_epaper.py script has pre-populated the cache, so API responses are fast (<0.2s). Test file: test_epaper_summary_expansion.py verifies summary lengths and language isolation.
